caption:
Anxious about 2026? Good.

It means you’re paying attention.

That anxiety is a signal.

It’s telling you that what used to work won’t work for much longer.

It’s telling you that it’s time to evolve.

Last year was tough for me, and that let to a lot of fear.

The fear that I’d lost my touch, that the game had moved on without me.

I could have let that failure paralyze me. Instead, I used it as fuel.

I used it to build the system I’m sharing in my live workshop tomorrow.

A system to tame the algorithm, leverage AI, and build a more resilient and profitable agency.

This is your final call.

Are you going to let your anxiety paralyze you, or are you going to use it as fuel?

Your choice.

The CALM Agency Workshop is tomorrow. Doors are closing.

Register here to join us live >> https://event.webinarjam.com/05onm/register/x4rx7img

caption:
So... Sora is now on Android you say? 🤔🤣

I'm Depesh, American born and bred lol
Vibe coding with AI? I spend just as much time vibe 'fixing' 💀

My team is NOT bigger than yours.

People see the results we get: $100M+ generated, 21X ROAS case studies - and assume I have a massive team of media buyers.

I don’t. My agency is lean. We punch above our weight.

Our secret? We build systems.

And now, our biggest leverage is AI.

I’m not talking about just using ChatGPT to write ad copy.

I’m talking about building an “AI layer” across your entire agency.

Imagine:

An AI project trained on your client’s brand to generate creative briefs faster than ever.

An Ad Engine that generates dozens of hooks and angles in just minutes.

An AI you can ask, “What’s the common theme among our top 5 performing ads?”

This isn’t about firing your team.

It’s about giving a small agency the operational capacity of one 10x its size.

It’s about making everyone on your team seem like they have super powers.

Want to see the exact prompts, tools, and workflows we’re using?

Join me for The CALM Agency Workshop on Jan 22nd.

Save your seat here >> https://event.webinarjam.com/05onm/register/x4rx7img

caption:
Ads were EASY in 2018! What happened? 🤔
In 2018, ads were easy, now it's tougher. The novelty's gone, guards are up. Our content strategy focuses on providing top-of-funnel value to bring people into our funnel. #FacebookAds #MarketingTips #ContentStrategy #DigitalMarketing #LeadGeneration #SalesFunnel #OnlineMarketing #BusinessGrowth #MarketingInsights #Advertising

Think Facebook ads are a snap? Not quite! There's a whole process. It's like expecting a cake to bake itself. For real results, try a Brand-Driven Performance Marketing framework! #FacebookAds #MarketingTips #AdvertisingStrategy #BrandMarketing #PerformanceMarketing #DigitalMarketing #SocialMediaMarketing #MarketingFramework

Worried about 2026? Here’s your survival guide.

After navigating multiple market shifts and algorithm changes, I’ve found the framework for thriving comes down to 4 key pillars.

MY 2026 CALM AGENCY FRAMEWORK:

CLIENT RETENTION.

Client retention starts from the moment you close a new lead.

But not all clients are equal.

Think of clients as the nutrition for your business; the better they are the better your business will be from it.

AUTOMATE RESULTS.

If getting the right clients is a goal itself then getting them results to retain them is the rest of the challenge.

A few years ago it was all systems and processes.

Right now it’s AI and Automation and now’s the time to get ahead.

LIFETIME VALUE.

Retaining clients is as much about the relationship and how you grow with them as the results you get.

We show how to maintain trust and integrity so clients want to stay longer and pay you more.

MARGIN.

The lifeblood of your business is cashflow.

We don’t just stop at getting and retaining clients, we focus you on making money and stacking cash for your long-term goals and investing back in the right way.

Focus on these four pillars, and you’ll build a business that can withstand any change Meta throws at you.

I’m going deep on all four in my live CALM Agency Workshop on Jan 22nd.

Click here to reserve your spot >> https://event.webinarjam.com/05onm/register/x4rx7img

#AgencyGrowth #MarketingStrategy #BusinessTips #AI #futureproof

alt: Photo by Depesh Mandalia OFFICIAL on July 11, 2025.

caption:
I collected my 5 yo and his friend from swimming today. He said "my dad's car can go super fast!" Then he says "Dad go fast show him!". 

I said I can't add there's too many cars.... They started chatting while sitting in the back about something else then as the traffic cleared I floored it. 

"Yeah Dad! That's super fast! See I told you!" He turned to his friends then they both started clapping lol

My daughter's laughing at this point I said what is it? 

She said they enjoyed it so much you got a round of applause 😂😂😂
